## Summary

Fixes all 7 recurring story ledger failures identified across 4 evaluation failure documents ("The River Remembers Blood", "The Awakening", "Unnamed Manuscript", "Ancient Bloodlines"). Also removes the Phase 0 fast-track bypass so all submissions run the mandatory 12-second calibration.

## Changes

### Phase 0 Bypass Removal (`app/api/jobs/route.ts`)
- `shouldFastTrackPhase0` set to unconditional `false` — no fast-track bypass regardless of word count
- Test updated to assert no fast-track behavior

### Narrator/Protagonist Extraction Fix (`lib/evaluation/seed/twoPassSeedValidation.ts`)
- Contamination filter regex no longer matches bare "narrator" (only matches "narrator_1", "narrator 2", etc.)
- Entries with `role_signal: protagonist/co_protagonist` or `pov_signal: pov_owner` are exempt from contamination filtering entirely

### Narrator Identity Merging (`lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts`)
- Added `NARRATOR_VARIANTS` set (10 known forms: "the narrator", "I_narrator", "first-person narrator", etc.)
- `normalize()` now converts underscores to spaces (fixes "The_river" / "The river" duplication)
- `resolveCanonical()` merges all narrator variants to single "narrator" identity

### Non-Character Filter (`lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts`)
- `NON_CHARACTER_PATTERNS` rejects craft concepts ("Time pressure / lack of ticking clock"), objects ("Missing_camper_truck"), and themes from character ledger

### Short-Form Awareness (`lib/evaluation/pipeline/characterReducer.ts`)
- `computeHardFailTriggers()` now accepts `totalChunksInManuscript` — chapters (≤2 chunks) skip co-protagonist warnings and ending accountability HARD_FAILs

### Pass 3A Short-Form Fix (`lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Preflight.ts`, `prompts/pass3a-preflight-reducer.ts`)
- Reducer prompt includes SHORT-FORM MODE preamble for ≤2-chunk manuscripts
- Empty zones filtered out for short-form — reducer sees only zones with data
- Confidence rules adjusted: single-zone evidence scores "moderate"/"high" instead of "low"
- System prompt updated with short-form confidence and closure rules

## Scope

**Touches:** Evaluation pipeline — Phase 0 routing, entity contamination filter, character reducer, Pass 3A reducer prompt
**Does NOT touch:** UI components, database schema, API endpoints (except Phase 0 routing), Pass 1/2/3B synthesis

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Pass 3A prompt changes may shift LLM scoring behavior for short-form manuscripts (intended — current behavior produces 100% empty drafts)
- Non-character filter uses pattern matching which could theoretically exclude a character whose name contains "ticking clock" — extremely unlikely in practice
- All 2724 tests pass, including 18 characterReducer, 125 pass3, 19 storyLayer, and 6 hardFail tests

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this is a pipeline fix targeting 7 recurring evaluation failures
